name: team subject no splits with team_pass_attempts_from_plays
description: Team subject FROM-source dispatch with no splits
expected_query: with "team" as (SELECT team_code FROM (VALUES ('ARI'),('ATL'),('BAL'),('BUF'),('CAR'),('CHI'),('CIN'),('CLE'),('DAL'),('DEN'),('DET'),('GB'),('HOU'),('IND'),('JAX'),('KC'),('LA'),('LAC'),('LV'),('MIA'),('MIN'),('NE'),('NO'),('NYG'),('NYJ'),('PHI'),('PIT'),('SEA'),('SF'),('TB'),('TEN'),('WAS')) AS t(team_code)), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(CASE WHEN psr_pid IS NOT NULL AND (sk IS NULL OR sk = false) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS team_pass_att_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."nfl_week_id" in ('2023_PRE_WEEK_1', '2023_PRE_WEEK_2', '2023_PRE_WEEK_3', '2023_PRE_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_1', '2023_REG_WEEK_2', '2023_REG_WEEK_3', '2023_REG_WEEK_4', '2023_REG_WEEK_5', '2023_REG_WEEK_6', '2023_REG_WEEK_7', '2023_REG_WEEK_8', '2023_REG_WEEK_9', '2023_REG_WEEK_10', '2023_REG_WEEK_11', '2023_REG_WEEK_12', '2023_REG_WEEK_13', '2023_REG_WEEK_14', '2023_REG_WEEK_15', '2023_REG_WEEK_16', '2023_REG_WEEK_17', '2023_REG_WEEK_18', '2023_POST_WEEK_1', '2023_POST_WEEK_2', '2023_POST_WEEK_3', '2023_POST_WEEK_4') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off"), "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" as materialized (select "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team", sum(t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7.team_pass_att_from_plays) as team_pass_att_from_plays from "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7"."nfl_team"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(tm ORDER BY game_count DESC, tm ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."seas_type" = 'REG' and "nfl_games"."year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."year", "player_gamelogs"."tm") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year") select "team"."team_code", "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_att_from_plays" AS "team_pass_att_from_plays_0" from "team" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "team"."team_code" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2023 left join "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats" on "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" group by "t5a2b2569de6127331d06ab399f9f3dd7_team_stats"."team_pass_att_from_plays", "team"."team_code" order by "team"."team_code" asc limit 500
